definitions: A customer relationship management system that utilizes artificial intelligence, machine learning, and data analytics to automate and enhance customer interactions, personalize experiences, and provide actionable insights.
An advanced CRM platform designed to predict customer needs, optimize sales processes, and improve customer service through intelligent automation and data-driven strategies.
examples: Implementing a Smart CRM can significantly boost sales efficiency.
The company invested in Smart CRM to better understand customer behavior.
Smart CRM features include predictive analytics and AI-powered chatbots.
